A3-3122, HHA-212 

60.1 - Post-Institutional Home Health Services Furnished During A 
Home Health Benefit Period - Beneficiaries Enrolled in Part A and Part 
B 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3122.1, HHA-212.1, A3-3122.1, HHA-212.2, PMs A-97-12, A-97-16, A-98-49 

Section 1812(a)(3) of the Act provides post-institutional home health services for 
individuals enrolled in Part A and Part B and home health services for individuals who 
are eligible for Part A only. For beneficiaries who are enrolled in
